# HyperFrames v0.7.27

Released on 2026-07-03.

This release adds three new capture-extraction categories (gradient washes, glass panels, nav CTAs) and migrates cloud-render uploads to the higher-capacity direct-uploads endpoint. Also includes reliability fixes across CLI (Chrome install races, media validation), producer (audio-mix failures now surface instead of shipping silently video-only), lint (several false-positive fixes), and slideshow presenter mode over screen share.

## Features

- **Capture:** Extract gradient washes, glass panels, and nav CTAs ([dd774b369](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/commit/dd774b3692e71656b038cb2d5a11f05ba52c2880), [#1879](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/pull/1879))
- **CLI:** Migrate cloud-render upload to /v3/assets/direct-uploads (200MB) ([a59ff0d91](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/commit/a59ff0d91b4074bd16b7e4d41fb9a9ffbc9eab8e), [#1844](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/pull/1844))

## Fixes

- **Hyperframes Media:** Npx spawn without shell:true fails silently on Windows ([3b6791824](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/commit/3b67918242ab0d74b37241b059fa54a792977067), [#1845](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/pull/1845))
- **Hyperframes Media:** Fall back to ffmpeg when ffprobe is missing ([e2b43583f](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/commit/e2b43583fc2480aa9511cd5e606a58841c4f211e), [#1877](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/pull/1877))
- **Hyperframes Media:** Cap TTS synthesis concurrency instead of firing every line at once ([2e9a33ca7](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/commit/2e9a33ca719a2b28bd8bb51083df32b8f74ca437), [#1862](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/pull/1862))
- **Producer:** Surface the reason when audio mixing fails instead of silently shipping video-only ([f40dbd86c](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/commit/f40dbd86cf2df77a26004578a66b4035e4d742c5), [#1854](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/pull/1854))
- **CLI:** Lock chrome-headless-shell install against concurrent extraction races ([638c33bc0](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/commit/638c33bc01965247614af67875644e2e18a8e4a3), [#1866](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/pull/1866))
- **CLI:** Validate stops misreporting slow-loading media as unreadable ([b087f1e3c](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/commit/b087f1e3c09d24e3a339ec4bf2f129af39f0a915), [#1849](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/pull/1849))
- **Engine:** Name the fix in the ffmpeg encode-timeout error message ([eef469075](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/commit/eef469075299439c0c79b38d8488639106a42dca), [#1858](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/pull/1858))
- **Lint:** Stop scene-exit hard-kill rules from contradicting gsap_animates_clip_element ([c7b34d5c6](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/commit/c7b34d5c6536129e5589377e7e4c9a0b763b4494), [#1846](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/pull/1846))
- **Lint:** Stop a leading <svg> defs block from being mistaken for the composition root ([8ee4b7dfd](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/commit/8ee4b7dfda8f884076f4844136611c886d8e8107), [#1867](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/pull/1867))
- **Lint:** Recognize computed-key window.\_\_timelines registrations ([d2f1adc2a](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/commit/d2f1adc2affea69e33550d60945a237e92602eb5), [#1874](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/pull/1874))
- **Lint:** Mention src: local() for system fonts in font_family_without_font_face ([b7eb0dfb5](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/commit/b7eb0dfb5a87d53bb542f5f70723110ea60c6990), [#1859](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/pull/1859))
- **Slideshow:** Make presenter mode work over Google Meet/Zoom screen share ([a7c3cc7d6](https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes/commit/a7c3cc7d689b13c5bb96559f9bad713205edb194))
